## Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat:` New feature (minor version bump)
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix (patch version bump)
- [ ] `refactor:` Code restructure (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation only
- [ ] `test:` Tests only
- [ ] `chore:` Maintenance / dependencies / CI
- [ ] Breaking change (major version bump)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cd vscode-extension && npm run test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`cd vscode-extension && npm run lint`)

### If this PR adds user-facing features:

- [ ] README.md updated with new feature description
- [ ] Commands table updated (if new commands added)
- [ ] Settings table updated (if new settings added)
